title: An Account of How (Musa b. Bughi 's Commanders (Fared against theZanj
description: Fared against the Zan j431 Following Ibn Muflib 's arrival in al-Ahwiz, he reportedly encamped for ten days at the Arbuk Bridge and then set out against ("Ali b. AbinI al-Muhallabi. Ibn Muflih was defeated in the encounter by al430. Ibn &I-Athir, Kdmil, VII, z6o, calls him lshaq b. Kandajiq. 431. See Ibn a]-Athit, Kdmil, VII, 159-6o.
